calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-08-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael Dobrov for Sigfrieda Shaposhnikov, Executor.

The Court enquired why Mr. Dobrov did not appear remotely. Mr. Dobrov stated that he did not want to spend the money on Court Call and that he does not have Zoom. The Court noted that instructions on the tentative ruling provide for a telephonic zoom option which is free. Mr. Dobrov stated that he just returned from traveling, saw the tentative ruling and appeared. The Court expressed concern that Mr. Dobrov decided to appear in person after he's been traveling putting at risk the health and safety of all at the court. The Court further stated there are no issues with the petition. The First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. is taken under submission. Mr. Dobrov provides a new proposed order in open court.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2020 Continued To Nov-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov for Sigfrieda Shaposhnikov (Petitioner).

The Court noted that Veronica is not present, that at the last hearing she was informed that she needed to file her objections, that nothing was received and that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with limited authority (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $20,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for February 8, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Continued To Dec-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov for Sigfrieda Shaposhnikov (Petitioner).
Veronica Shaposhnikov in Propria Persona.
Wladuysalw Jan Leja (Friend of Veronica) also present.

The Court noted that the first named Executor Michael Shaposhnikov was unable to serve and that Mr. Dobrov nominated Sigfrieda. Ms. Shaposhnikov stated that she does not speak English well, that she was not noticed and that she does not have a Lawyer. Mr. Dobrov stated that he did provide service to Ms. Shaposhnokiv and that he used the same address as he did before in the trust matter. Ms. Shaposhnikov stated that she is objecting to the petition. The Court informed Ms. Shaposhnikov that she needs to file her objections by November 27, 2019 and that she needs to follow all of the rules. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration is continued to December 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.
